title: Missing Breach Detection or Audit Logging
description: Absence of audit logging for access to personal data makes it impossible to detect, assess, and notify of personal data breaches within GDPR Article 33's 72-hour requirement.

finding.message: Personal data access without apparent audit logging at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Log all access to personal data with: who accessed it, when, from where, and what data was accessed.
Store audit logs in a write-once, tamper-evident store separate from application logs.
Implement automated alerts for abnormal access patterns (bulk exports, off-hours access).
GDPR Article 33 requires notification to supervisory authority within 72 hours of becoming aware of a breach.
